content:
Hi everyone! 👋

Over the past few years, I've spent a lot of time working with AWS, Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD, observability, and production infrastructure. One thing I noticed is that many tutorials stop at the basics, while real-world engineering often involves much more.

That's why I started CloudOps Blog.

The goal is simple: publish practical, production-focused content that engineers can apply in their own environments.

You'll find articles on topics such as:

☁️ AWS Architecture & Best Practices

☸️ Kubernetes & CKA Preparation

🏗️ Terraform Infrastructure as Code

🚀 CI/CD Pipelines

📊 Monitoring & Observability

🔐 Security & IAM

💰 Cost Optimization

🛠️ Real Production Incidents & Solutions

Some recent articles include:

Kubernetes Rolling Updates & Rollbacks

Deployments vs ReplicaSets

Auto Scaling Lifecycle Hooks

Production-ready AWS Infrastructure

If you're interested in cloud engineering, DevOps, or platform engineering, I'd love to hear your feedback.

👉 Blogs:

Articles | CloudOps Blog

Practical cloud, DevOps, SRE, Kubernetes, and infrastructure guides.

cloudopsblog.com

I'm also open to suggestions on topics you'd like to see covered next.

Happy learning! 🚀

aws #kubernetes #devops #terraform #cloud #platformengineering #sre #opensource
